trigger: ω-toolchain-2 (audit-only close, 2026-04-26T21:15Z) surfaced one self-defect in tool/audit_shim_ssot.hexa::_witness — injection write silently no-ops on uchg-locked targets (build/hexa_interp has chflags uchg via raw#9), causing false-positive caught_pattern=no + recovery cp failure. Production capabilities (default/--json/--selftest) intact; only the self-test stunt was broken. Deferred to toolchain-3 because target file was parallel-session-dirty at toolchain-2 close.
verdict: fixed — witness now SKIPs gracefully on uchg-locked targets (exit 0 + sentinel), proceeds normally on unlocked targets, and distinguishes uchg-induced recovery cp failure from generic cp failure. 6/6 validation cases pass.

parallel_session_status.verdict: safe to proceed — parallel session iterating on lexer/parser/attrs/native, not on tool/audit_shim_ssot.hexa

defect_class: self-test silent no-op against hardened (chflags uchg) target

additions: _is_uchg_locked(path) helper — macOS-only, uses `stat -f "%Sf" PATH | grep -q uchg`. Returns false on non-Darwin (raw#9 chflags uchg is macOS-specific).
Step 0 gate in _witness — checks _is_uchg_locked(live_path) before backup; on lock emits `[witness] SKIP — target uchg-locked (path=...)` + rationale + remediation hint, returns 0.

Step 4 parallel safeguard — if recovery cp fails AND target is now uchg-locked, emits distinct `[witness] FAIL: restore cp blocked by uchg flag on PATH` + race-window note + manual recovery command. Falls through to original generic message otherwise.
fix_summary.rationale: raw#9 hardens build/hexa_interp with chflags uchg precisely to prevent silent overwrites. The witness's deliberate self-corruption stunt is fundamentally incompatible with that hardening on the live target — gracefully skipping is the correct semantic. The witness mechanism itself is sound (validated against unlocked target in case 4).

validation_cases.label: pre-fix smoke (locked live shim)
validation_cases.actual_summary: audit run: drift_pairs=0 caught_pattern=no / FAIL: restore cp from backup

validation_cases.label: post-fix smoke (locked live shim)
validation_cases.actual_summary: [witness] SKIP — target uchg-locked (path=/Users/ghost/core/hexa-lang/build/hexa_interp) + rationale + remediation hint

validation_cases.label: helper logic on /tmp fixture (chflags toggle)
validation_cases.cmd: touch /tmp/witness_test.txt && chflags uchg /tmp/witness_test.txt && stat -f "%Sf" /tmp/witness_test.txt | grep -q uchg
validation_cases.expected: grep matches (locked) → exit 0; after chflags nouchg → exit non-zero
validation_cases.result: PASS — helper logic validated at shell level

validation_cases.label: unlocked live shim (witness proceeds normally)
validation_cases.cmd: chflags nouchg build/hexa_interp && hexa run tool/audit_shim_ssot.hexa --witness && chflags uchg build/hexa_interp
validation_cases.actual_summary: audit run: drift_pairs=1 caught_pattern=yes / restored / post-restore audit: drift_pairs=0 / OK — audit caught injection, restore returned tree to clean state

validation_cases.label: production capabilities preserved (default + --json)
validation_cases.summary_a: registered pairs: 1 / [ok] build/hexa_interp <- tool/install_interp_shim.hexa / RESULT: clean

raw_constraints_check.no_parallel_collision: ok — checked at start (clean) + before commit (only our M added). Parallel session iterating on different files.
raw_constraints_check.no_anima_commit: ok — closure JSON written to /Users/ghost/core/anima/state/omega_toolchain_3_witness_uchg_fix.json (UNTRACKED, anima)
raw_constraints_check.raw9_hardening_preserved: ok — chflags uchg restored on build/hexa_interp after case-4 validation

deliverables.headline: ω-toolchain-3 closed: --witness now uchg-aware (SKIPs on locked targets, proceeds on unlocked, distinguishes uchg-induced recovery failures). Self-test capability restored without weakening raw#9 hardening.

followups_open: ω-toolchain-2 audit-only baseline (2026-04-26T21:15Z) confirmed clean — no shim drift in production
Future cycle could optionally add a --witness-fixture=PATH flag to exercise the witness against arbitrary unlocked files without touching build/hexa_interp's uchg state

If raw#9 mechanism ever extends to Linux (chattr +i), update _is_uchg_locked to dispatch on uname (currently returns false on non-Darwin, so witness would proceed and fail noisily — acceptable until that lands)
